zh.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore是Robert de Whitmore的女兒，於1221年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾。她於大約1242年與Reginald de Botreaux在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore是Robert de Whitmore的女儿，于1221年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾。她于大约1242年与Reginald de Botreaux在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitmoor (Devon) or Whitmore (Staffordshire and Dorset), or from any of numerous other places in England with names denoting a white moor or mere (from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + mōr ‘moor’ or mere ‘pool’).
History: Francis Whitmore settled in Cambridge, MA, before 1648.

variants.name: Whittemore
meanings: History: Thomas Whittemore came from England to Charlestown, MA, in or c. 1639. Amos Whittemore, born in Cambridge, MA, in 1759 was an inventor and gunsmith, and another Thomas Whittemore was born in Boston in 1800; he was a Universalist clergyman and MA legislator.

variants.name: Whitmer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Wittmeyer   or of   Wittmer  .

variants.name: Whitmarsh
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitemarsh, a place in the parish of Sedgehill, Wiltshire, named from Old English hwīt ‘white’ (i.e. ‘phosphorescent’) + mersc ‘marsh’. Compare Whitmore .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore was born in 1221, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert de Whitmore. She married Reginald de Botreaux about 1242, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore est née en 1221, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert de Whitmore. Elle a épousé Reginald de Botreaux environ 1242, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore wurde 1221 in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert de Whitmore geboren. Sie hat um 1242 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Reginald de Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore è nata il nel 1221 nel Boscastle, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert de Whitmore. Lei sposato Reginald de Botreaux circa 1242, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.Boscastle, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストル
ja.Cornwall, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルコルンワル
ja.of Botreaux Castle, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストル
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmoreは1221年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストルでRobert de Whitmoreの娘として生まれた。約1242年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでReginald de Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore(은)는 1221년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보스카스틀에서 Robert de Whitmore의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Reginald de Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore nasceu em 1221, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Robert de Whitmore. Ela casou-se com Reginald de Botreaux aproximadamente 1242, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore родилась в 1221 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert de Whitmore. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de Botreaux около 1242 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret De Whitmore nació en 1221, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Robert de Whitmore. Se casó con Reginald de Botreaux aproximadamente 1242, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
